message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for xor_filter, tantivy_quality, viewport_reflow_planner

Add arb strategies for XorFilterStats, LatencyBudget, QualityReport,
ReflowBatch, ReflowLineRange, ReflowPlan and serde/clone/invariant tests.
Each file expanded from 30 to 36 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
